ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Almond, with peel, no added salt

ingredients_text: _Nuez_ en grano 30%, _almendra_ repelada frita 28% (_almendra_ repelada, aceite de girasol, sal), _almendra_ con piel tostada 25%, _avellana_ repelada 15%.
